text:
Created attachment 233091
Screenshot: menu option 8

Current behaviour after taking menu option 8
============================================

From <https://forums.freebsd.org/posts/535243>: 

> … it's necessary to key 2 – sometimes repeatedly, until the required 
> environment is listed as active.
> 
> There can be a sense of disorder in response to the key presses, so pay 
> close attention to each name that appears on the line.
